## 2.2.2.G. PI #7

### What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?

Detailed monthly monitoring of performance has started for EHAM; the same is in development for the other airports. Based on detailed analyses, measures to improve performance will be developed. These will focus on reducing the time in level flight, not specifically the share of CDOs.
